moments.title: Blondie's Debbie Harry turns 81
moments.blurb: Iconic Blondie frontwoman Debbie Harry, known for hits like 'Heart of Glass' and 'Call Me', celebrates her 81st birthday on July 1st.

angles.name: Punk Icon
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to the one and only Debbie Harry! Still setting trends and rocking stages. What's your favourite Blondie track?

angles.name: Blondie Hits
angles.copy: From 'Heart of Glass' to 'Rapture', Debbie Harry shaped an era. Wishing the Blondie legend a very happy 81st birthday on July 1st!

angles.name: Ageless Rocker
angles.copy: 81 and still fabulous! Debbie Harry's influence on music and style is undeniable. What's her most iconic look or lyric for you?
